title: Ka Architecture Concept Born
summary: The founding idea: AI systems modelled on the ancient Kemetic body — nine organs, one soul, one life force (Ka). Dr. Tdka Kilimanjaro formalises the nine-organ model.

title: Nine-Organ Taxonomy Defined
summary: Brain (tehuti-core), Memory (maat-memory), Hands (filesystem), Senses (n8n), Voice (maat-studio), Ka (ka-discovery), Skeleton (postgres), Blood (pipeline), Soul (disk) — ports and protocols assigned.

title: MANIFEST.ka Draft v0.5
summary: First machine-readable declaration of a Ka body. Includes organ port map, bearer token requirement, and sacred/replaceable classification.

title: MaatBench Evaluation Framework Designed
summary: 49-principle ethical evaluation matrix established. Score is a 7x7 evaluation framework, distinct from the 42-Nome structural system. First bodies score 49/49.

title: 42-Nome Structural Constitution Ratified
summary: Formal separation of structural layer (42 Nomes) from ethical layer (MaatBench score). Constitution v1.0 establishes that 42 is the structural unit count; 49 is evaluation only.

title: MANIFEST.ka v1.0.0
summary: Root declaration of the Ka body — all nine organs, endpoints, ports, and the MaatBench score anchor. First stable release.

title: MAAT Studio v1 Launched
summary: First Ka body dashboard — 7 screens: Dashboard, Ka Health, Memory, Brain, Hands, Evolution, Settings. Live organ health polling every 30 seconds.

title: Evolution Pipeline Activated
summary: SENSE → STORE → PATTERN → PROMOTE → APPLY → MEASURE → DECAY loop implemented in Blood organ. First self-improving Ka body goes live.

title: Sacred vs Replaceable Doctrine Published
summary: Formal doctrine: Soul, Ka, Skeleton are sacred (non-replaceable). Brain, Memory, Hands, Senses, Voice, Blood are replaceable. Capability evolves; character endures.

title: Maat Ecosystem Reference Body Launched
summary: Private monorepo published as the reference implementation. Includes MANIFEST.ka, nine organ directories, LAB-WORKSPACE.md, and maatbench/ evaluation suite.

title: Ka Education Backend Deployed
summary: Fastify backend (port 3007) providing /projects/search, /handles/search, and /ask-scholar. Powers the Ka Education Frontend live-data sections.

title: Ka Education Frontend Live
summary: Single-page education portal merging the Ka Architecture public site with four live-data sections: Live Projects, Live Handles, Chronology, and Ask Scholar.
